summary: Bug fix verification for Album Art display and Mood Grid styling. Both bugs are FIXED. Album artwork now displays correctly in ISO and Haul modals (Discogs search results show actual album covers). Mood grid shows all 12 buttons with uniform 36px height, no text wrapping, and Spin Party has the disco ball emoji 🪩.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Album Art and Mood Grid bugs verified fixed. The toWebP() function in AlbumArt.js now skips Discogs URLs to prevent 403 errors. Mood grid buttons have uniform 36px height with whitespace-nowrap. Spin Party emoji is 🪩 (disco ball, U+1FAA9).

features_verified.album_art_iso_modal: PASS - ISO search shows album cover images (6 imgs from i.discogs.com)
features_verified.album_art_haul_modal: PASS - Haul search shows album cover images (8 imgs)
features_verified.mood_uniform_height: PASS - All mood buttons at 36px height
features_verified.backend_discogs_search: PASS - API returns results with non-empty cover_url fields

bug_fix_details.album_art_root_cause: AlbumArt.js toWebP() function was converting Discogs CDN URLs from .jpeg to .webp, but Discogs returns HTTP 403 for .webp URLs. Fix: Added check to skip webp conversion for URLs containing 'discogs'.
bug_fix_details.mood_grid_changes: ComposerBar.js MOOD_CONFIG updated: Spin Party emoji changed from 🩩 (U+1FA69) to 🪩 (U+1FAA9 disco ball). Mood button styling: height 36px, whitespace-nowrap, fontSize 10.5px
